Description: Initialize Next.js app with TypeScript, ESLint, and Prettier. Set up API client base using Axios/Fetch with interceptors for JWT auth.
Acceptance Criteria: Next.js router setup; TypeScript strict mode enabled; API client handles auth headers.

Description: Build Login, Registration, and OTP verification flows integrating with the Identity Module. Follow Figma DS-011–015.
Acceptance Criteria: Login form with validation; 6-digit OTP input with timer; Error handling (wrong pass, expired OTP).

Description: Build the company registration flow. Implement 12-digit BIN validation mask. Integrate with Integrity Module.
Acceptance Criteria: BIN format validated (12 digits); Form data submitted to /api/v1/companies; Success redirect.

Description: Main catalog view showing Equipment Cards. Toggle between Grid and List views. Handle pagination from API.
Acceptance Criteria: Responsive CSS grid; Pagination/infinite scroll working; Sort by price/date functioning.

Description: Faceted filter sidebar (desktop) and bottom sheet (mobile) for category, price, region. Sync active filters to URL query params.
Acceptance Criteria: Filters trigger API calls correctly; URL updates when filters change; Active filter chips working.

Description: Full listing detail page. Photo gallery lightbox, specifications table, seller info card, and sticky Contact CTA.
Acceptance Criteria: Images load correctly; Specs rendered from dynamic schema; Seller info fetches from Identity.

Description: Complex 5-step form. Step 2 requires rendering dynamic inputs based on Category selected in Step 1. Auto-save drafts.
Acceptance Criteria: Multi-step context state working; Dynamic specs form maps correctly to JSON payload; Media upload step works.

Description: Deals inbox and detail view. Render different action buttons based on the deal's current status and the user's role (buyer/seller).
Acceptance Criteria: List of deals showing correct status; Detail view shows timeline; Action buttons (Confirm, Pay) map to API.

Description: Checkout interface. Kaspi and Halyk payment method selectors. Handle redirect from provider and success/failure/pending screens.
Acceptance Criteria: Provider selection routes correctly; Success/failure parsing from return URL; Amount displayed formatted in KZT.

Description: Date range picker for rentals. Calculate total price = days * rate. Handle conflict/unavailable UI states from API.
Acceptance Criteria: Date range selection is intuitive; Prevents selecting disabled dates; Price calculation matches backend.

Description: WebSocket client integration. Render message bubbles, handling Sent/Delivered/Read states. Implement typing indicators.
Acceptance Criteria: WS connection stable; Messages render in correct order; Send/Receive works without refresh.

Description: Bell icon in header with unread badge calculation. Dropdown list of recent notifications linking to respective entities.
Acceptance Criteria: Unread count accurate; Dropdown opens on click; Clicking notification marks read and navigates.

Description: Reusable drag-and-drop upload zone. Generate presigned URL from backend and PUT directly to MinIO. Track upload progress.
Acceptance Criteria: Drag-and-drop works; PUT to MinIO successful; Progress bar updates; Preview thumbnail generated.

Description: Render data visualizations (charts/graphs) for seller stats using Recharts or similar. Plan comparison and upgrade UI.
Acceptance Criteria: Charts render API data correctly; Date range picker filters data; Subscription upgrade flow works.

Description: Admin-only layout. Split pane view for reviewing listings. Approve/Reject actions with reason modal.
Acceptance Criteria: Admin layout distinct; Queue fetches correctly; Batch actions (Approve/Reject) send correct API payloads.
